list.name: room
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT room_id FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT room_id FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Температура воздуха (air_temp), °C
panels.description: Диапазон до 48 ч — сырые показания; длиннее — почасовая свёртка sensor_readings_hourly (среднее за час).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS "time", room_id AS metric, value FROM sensor_readings WHERE metric = 'air_temp' AND room_id IN (${room:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz <= interval '48 hours' UNION ALL SELECT bucket AS "time", room_id AS metric, avg_value AS value FROM sensor_readings_hourly WHERE metric = 'air_temp' AND room_id IN (${room:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket) AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz > interval '48 hours' ORDER BY 1
